'''Z'fell''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Z'fell system/Legends|Z'fell system]] of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. It was one of the original 13 planets of the [[Duskhan League]]. The planet was attacked by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
